positive: A whimsical, symmetrical minimalist illustration of a lush forest canopy viewed from above (top-down/flat lay perspective). The scene features interconnected botanical elements: stylized ferns, delicate trailing vines, abstract watercolor leaves, and subtle pop-up geometric shapes mimicking dew drops or sunlight rays. The color palette should be harmonious and sophisticated: deep teal, muted sage green, dusty gold, and creamy ivory. The style must be highly refined, resembling elegant Scandinavian graphic design or botanical etching, with clean, crisp silhouettes and soft, dappled shadow work. Excellent for central placement on a t-shirt or tote bag. Studio lighting, high contrast, high detail, vector quality, centered composition.
